transitions.name: scheduled_ingestion
transitions.description: Triggered by scheduled job to ingest raw inventory data.
transitions.end_state_description: Raw inventory data has been successfully ingested.

process.name: ingest_raw_data
process.description: Process to ingest raw inventory data from the SwaggerHub API.

transitions.name: transform_data
transitions.description: Transform the ingested raw inventory data.
transitions.start_state_description: Raw inventory data has been ingested and is ready for transformation.
transitions.end_state_description: Inventory data has been successfully transformed.

process.name: transform_data
process.description: Process to transform raw inventory data into a suitable format.

transitions.name: enrich_data
transitions.description: Enrich the transformed inventory data with additional information.
transitions.start_state_description: Transformed inventory data is ready for enrichment.
transitions.end_state_description: Inventory data has been successfully enriched.

process.name: enrich_data
process.description: Process to enrich transformed inventory data with external information.

transitions.name: aggregate_data
transitions.description: Aggregate the enriched inventory data for reporting.
transitions.start_state_description: Enriched inventory data is ready for aggregation.
transitions.end_state_description: Inventory data has been successfully aggregated.

process.name: aggregate_data
process.description: Process to aggregate enriched inventory data for report generation.

transitions.name: add_report
transitions.description: Generate and store a report from the aggregated inventory data.
transitions.start_state_description: Aggregated inventory data is ready for report generation.
transitions.end_state_description: Inventory report has been successfully generated.

process.name: generate_report
process.description: Process to generate a report from the aggregated inventory data.
